_comment: OPTIONAL. Copy this file to 'toolkit.config.json' (next to the launcher) to change the defaults fleet-wide - e.g. drop the same file on every USB. If this file is absent, the toolkit works out of the box with the built-in defaults. Command-line flags always override these values.
_alerts: Optional: push monitor/scan alarms to a webhook, Telegram or syslog (leave blank to disable).
_contain: Optional & DISRUPTIVE: actions to run on alarm. e.g. ["killproc","network","lock"]. Empty = off.
